mapper.select: select coupon_count from store where store_id =#{storeId}
mapper.update: update store set coupon_Count = coupon_Count -1 where store_id =#{storeId} and coupon_count > 0
mapper.insert: insert into discount_table (store_id, car_no, discount_minutes,apply_date) values(#{storeId}, #{car_No}, #{discountMinutes}, now())
